🚨🚨🚨CASTING CALL – URGENT ROLES NEEDED!🚨🚨🚨

We are casting a few last-minute roles for the upcoming hip-hop musical feature film "Worth It All." This project is high-energy, passion-driven, and will be filmed in and around Gary, Indiana.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must be available for ALL rehearsals and shooting dates.

• First two rehearsals will be on Zoom for your convenience.

• Once lines are memorized, rehearsals will be held on-site (Gary area).

• We'll be shooting the official trailer (3 scenes) soon after.

PLEASE DO NOT WASTE OUR TIME.

If you cannot commit to:

• Zoom rehearsals,
• In-person rehearsals,
• And filming dates,

do not apply.

We’re looking for real dedication. If you’ve got the talent, passion, and availability, we’d love to see what you bring to the table.

To submit:

Text : Movie to (219) 200-4322

Let’s make something powerful together.
#WorthItAllTheMovie #CastingCall #GaryIndianaFilm #HipHopMusical #NowCasting

Roles below👇🏽👇🏽👇🏽

items.text:
Casting Call: 4-minute Student Film
We are a group of four university students looking for actors to star in our 4-minute film for a filmmaking course.

This film explores two long-time friends with things they haven't said to each other in the brief time they have between a nuclear strike warning and their deaths. It is of a more serious tone and contains themes related to mental health, which some may find triggering.

Location: Coquitlam, BC
Shoot date: Either Saturday, March 21st, or Sunday, March 22nd, depending on availability.
Compensation: Meals provided for duration of the shoot time, no monetary compensation.
Union status: Non-Union

Roles:

Character A: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

Anxious and emotional person who often worries about being liked by others. Upon the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over the things they won't have time to do in the future. Despite all their self-focused spiraling however, they care deeply about their best friend, Character B.

Character B: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

A seemingly aloof person who comes across as very closed off and sardonic. Upon the the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over their past actions. They don't let this show, however, and put on an indifferent face. Character B generally stays very guarded about their life, even around their best friend Character A. Although they have a tendency to lash out at others when faced with emotional vulnerability, they still care very deeply about Character A.

If interested in a role, please contact smp30@sfu.ca with name, headshot, preferred form of contact, and acting reel (if applicable) for further information.

items.text:
Casting call for A Curated Exit (Theatre, Paid, non union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions
**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White
**Director:**

Richard White
**Union Status**

Non-Union
**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance
**Compensation Details**

Profit Share
**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)
**Submission Deadline**

Friday, April 4, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.
**Submission Instructions**

Please contact *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)* to receive sides for a self tape.
Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)*.
**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.
**Casting for:**

***STEVE***** **Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

items.text:
🎬 **REAL COUPLES WANTED — Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis Short Films**

Hi Vancouver! I'm a grad student at **Beijing Film Academy** (one of the top film schools in Asia), and I'm shooting **three short ad films** for my MFA thesis project here in Vancouver.

**The concept:** Three everyday scenarios between a couple — eating hot pot, relaxing in/around water, and jumping on a bed together — filmed with a cinematic, dreamlike visual style. Think slow motion, close-ups, and beautiful lighting. The films explore how ordinary moments between two people can feel extraordinary.

**What you'd be doing:** — Eating hot pot together (feeding each other, reacting to spicy food, lounging on the couch after) — Interacting around water (splashing, getting close, leaning against each other) — Jumping and bouncing on a bed together (pillow fights, flopping down, catching your breath side by side)

Some scenes include light physical closeness — hugs, holding each other, a camera-angled kiss (no actual lip contact). Everything is shot tastefully and artistically. This is an academic film project, not a commercial shoot.

**What I need:** ✅ A real couple ✅ Ages 20–38

📅 **March 27 or 28** (one day, within 8 hours) 

Interested? DM me and I'll share the full concept + storyboards!

MODEL CASTING CALL ✨

Glam Gallery is looking for the Face of Glam Gallery 2026!

The search is for someone confident, photogenic and passionate about beauty, hair and photography to represent our brand throughout 2026.

The selected model will receive:
• Professional photoshoots and photos throughout the year on collaboration basis
• Hair styling transformations
• Feature on Instagram/ Facebook & promotional material
• Commission opportunities 

To apply:
1️⃣ Follow instagram account @glamgalleryleeds
2️⃣ Send a DM with 3 photos of yourself (face, hair, full body)
3️⃣ Tell us why you would love to represent Glam Gallery

Applications close: 29th March 2026

There is no age restrictions however under 18 would require parent consent.

Tag someone who should apply! 💫

And yes, this will provide you with the content for the year!! ✨️✨️✨️
#brandambassador  #modelcall l #faceofthebrand  #influencersearch  #modelsearch #collaboration #paidpartnership #brandrep #brandrepsearch

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

items.summary:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

items.text:
**Poszukiwany aktor lub aktorka 40+ do stałej współpracy**

Poszukujemy aktora lub aktorkę w wieku od 40 lat, głównie z okolic Katowic do stałej współpracy przy tworzeniu materiałów reklamowych. 

Wymagania:
* wiek: 40+ 
* brak udziału w reklamach płatnych w branży prawnej bądź innej przez okres minimum 2 miesiące
* dyspozycyjność

Zlecenie płatne. 

Prosimy o zgłoszenia z filmikiem 10-15 sekundowym z przedstawieniem wizerunku.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na mail: h.wojtaczka@adgen.pl

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

sharedPost.text: ☀️🏝️💕 One of the greatest gifts Jimmy gave me was a love for and a dream of living in Key West. It’s been wonderful to honor him and his legacy throughout the streets of Key West this past weekend. Hard to believe he’s been in the ethers for two years now … flying high with that twinkle in his eye - in hot pursuit of the next big adventure! This great piece was on Good Morning America this morning. #BubblesUp #justafewfriends

Actors… if your CV looks like everyone else’s, you’re blending in.

Casting directors are looking for something different.

Stand-up comedy builds:
✔️ Confidence
✔️ Timing
✔️ Presence
✔️ The ability to make written words feel real

That’s why so many comedians are brilliant actors.

🎤 LOL Factory Weekender
📍 MZA HQ Bradford
👨‍🏫 With James Bayes

items.text:
**GENERAL AUDITIONS – The Bronx, NY**

Are you an actor with a passion for history? Come join us for an upcoming Live History performance in The Bronx, New York. We’re seeking local actors for a theatrical experience.

Interested? Read our casting call below!

Live History is an international theater company that specializes in interactive, site-specific performances in historic buildings, often incorporating elements of an escape room–style experience. 

This particular production features a **historical/classic script originally written in the 1700s**. Actors should be comfortable working with period language and classical text.

**Role Available: UNDERSTUDY**

**Age: 21+**

**Gender: Any**

We are casting the role of **UNDERSTUDY**.

The Understudy will:
* Cover up to **five (5) roles** in the show.
* Read for absent actors during rehearsals.
* Be prepared to move into any assigned role in the event of illness on the day of the performance.
* Potentially be used as a silent on-stage character during the show, if desired.

This is an excellent opportunity for a versatile and prepared performer who is comfortable tracking multiple roles and stepping in with confidence.

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid **$200 total as an honorarium **for one performance and all online/Zoom rehearsals.

**Show Date**

**March 22, 2026**
IN PERSON – Bronx, NY
**Rehearsals**

Rehearsals will take place primarily over Zoom with the last few in person:
* Zoom rehearsals are **one hour each**, held **3–4 times per week**.
* Most rehearsals occur during **daytime hours**.
* Some exceptions for existing conflicts may be accommodated, provided the actor can attend the majority of rehearsals.
**MANDATORY ZOOM Dress Rehearsal**

March 20 (Friday) | 7:00–9:00 PM EST
**MANDATORY IN-PERSON Dress Rehearsals**

March 21
March 22 (prior to the 2:00 PM showtime)

Attendance at all dress rehearsals  and in person show is required.

**Auditions**

Auditions will be held virtually (via Zoom) on:

Wednesday, March 4th | 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM EST

Auditions will consist of a scripted cold read.

**To Request an Audition**

Please submit a resume and headshot to:
[livehistoryusa@gmail.com](https://)

Subject line:
**THE BRONX AUDITIONS**

Actors must be 21+ and have a professional resume and headshot to be considered.

For more information, visit:
[www.livehistoryshows.com](https://www.livehistoryshows.com)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING NOTICE – STUDENT SHORT FILM

Title: Incoherent
Project Type: Junior Thesis Project – Loyola Marymount University
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Director: Royce Haddock
Producers: Ava Correia, Walter Bridgewater
Shoot Dates: 3-Day Shoot (Friday,  March 20 / Saturday, March 21/ Sunday, March 22)
Location: Los Angeles/ Ladera Heights, CA
Compensation: $100/day (3 days total) + Meals & Credit

🎥 PROJECT OVERVIEW
Incoherent is a psychological thriller/drama centered on grief, memory, and the fractured relationship between a father and his daughter.
Abel, a grieving father, is trapped in a recurring nightmare that forces him to relive the day he lost one of his daughters. On the eve of the 10-year anniversary, the nightmare changes—he can no longer wake up. As he searches for answers within this psychological loop, a real-life emergency unfolds, putting his surviving daughter in danger.
At its core, this is a story about a man learning how to live again after unimaginable loss—and a father and daughter struggling to reconnect after years of emotional distance.

🎭 CASTING ROLE
ABEL (Lead)
Gender: Male
Ethnicity: Black / African American
Age Range: Late 30s – 40s
Role Type: Lead
Shoot Requirement: Must be available all 3 shoot days
Character Description:
Selfless, steadfast, and emotionally guarded. Abel is a devoted single father who once had two daughters, but after the tragic loss of one at a young age, he has become emotionally withdrawn.
Ten years later, he remains psychologically stuck in that moment—avoiding anything that reminds him of the loss. His unresolved grief prevents him from being fully present in the life of his surviving daughter, now 18, creating a quiet but painful emotional distance between them.
Throughout the film, Abel is forced to confront the truth he’s been running from, making this role heavily performance-driven with strong emotional depth.
Additional Notes:
Facial hair preferred
Must be comfortable portraying intense emotional scenes (grief, distress, vulnerability)
Strong dramatic acting ability required

📩 SUBMISSION DETAILS
Headshot • Resume • Demo Reel (if available)
Must confirm availability for all shoot dates
Submit To: IncoherentShortFilm@gmail.com
Subject Line: INCOHERENT – ABEL SUBMISSION – [Your Name]

Title: Incoherent
Project Type: Junior Thesis Project – Loyola Marymount University
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Director: Royce Haddock
Producers: Ava Correia, Walter Bridgewater
Shoot Dates: 3-Day Shoot (Friday,  March 20 / Saturday, March 21/ Sunday, March 22)
Location: Los Angeles/ Ladera Heights, CA
Compensation: $100/day (3 days total) + Meals & Credit

🎥 PROJECT OVERVIEW
Incoherent is a psychological thriller/drama centered on grief, memory, and the fractured relationship between a father and his daughter.
Abel, a grieving father, is trapped in a recurring nightmare that forces him to relive the day he lost one of his daughters. On the eve of the 10-year anniversary, the nightmare changes—he can no longer wake up. As he searches for answers within this psychological loop, a real-life emergency unfolds, putting his surviving daughter in danger.
At its core, this is a story about a man learning how to live again after unimaginable loss—and a father and daughter struggling to reconnect after years of emotional distance.

items.text:
Buena Park In-Person Auditions! 

Already successfully running in Orlando, FL - opening in Buena Park in May 2026! 

In-person auditions for **The Speakeasy Murder & Other Acts of Prohibition **will be held March 26 and March 27 from 3:00pm until 7:00pm PST at the Beach Boulevard Club in Buena Park, CA. This is an open call for all principal roles, understudies, and on-call performers. 

Performers may be asked to attend call-backs, which will be held on March 27 from 7:00pm until 9:00pm PST at the same location.

Please be prepared to read from the script (sides will be provided). If auditioning for a character who sings, please prepare a 32-bar or 1-minute cut of an up-tempo Broadway or jazz standard, with a belt.

We are not accepting video submissions at this time. 

**Character Breakdowns**

**Charlie “The Tuna” Scarpelli - ***30s-60s *

Charlie is the classic 1920’s gangster. He runs the NYC nightclub called “The 38”. He’s tough and rarely hears “no” for an answer. He once had a prolonged fling with Rose (as he does with ALL his headliners). But now, he is pursuing Carmen Colada.  *Singing Role

**Mr. Cain - ***Late 20s-50s*

Mr. Cain is Charlie’s henchman. He is Charlie’s confidant and knows almost all of Charlie’s inside secrets. He is in love with Rose. Almost everyone treats Mr. Cain with respect. 

**Lawrence “Larry” Lombardo - ***Late 20s-50s*

Larry Lombardo is the wisecracking bandleader. He is in debt to Charlie which explains his employment at The 38.  He’s lighthearted, yet disgruntled. He once knew how to lead an orchestra, but now he is less than enthusiastic about his current gig. *Singing Role

**Tommy Merengue - ***Early 20s-30s*

Tommy is the emcee at The 38. He falls in love with Carmen. He owes Charlie his life. Above all, it is Tommy’s job to keep the show going. *Singing Role

**Rose Meadowlark - ***Late 20s-50s*

Rose, at one point, was the toast of the town. She is now a washed-up has-been. She has a good voice, but these days she’s damaged goods. Rose is still in love with Charlie and yearns for the days of yesteryear. Channel Lola's story of Copacabana....

*Singing Role 

**Carmen Colada - ***Early 20s-30s*

Carmen is the sweet ingénue. She will soon be the headliner at The 38, and everyone (except her) knows it. She is a little flaky and falls in love with Tommy.

*Singing Role

**Mama Scarpelli - ***Any Age*

Mamma is the quintessential Italian Mother. She is sweet yet tough. She is Charlie’s mother and owns The 38. Her ownership is her trump card, and she knows how to use it.

https://speakeasymurder.com

623-270-5115

CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link [https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true)

items.text:
**OPEN CASTING CALL**
**キャスティング募集のお知らせ**

**SEEKING JAPANESE SPEAKING, JAPANESE PEOPLE**
**日本語が話せる、日本人の方を募集しています**

Casting Directors, Colleen Bolton and Maureen Webb are 
**seeking Japanese speaking people for MAJOR TV SERIES**.
No Acting Experience Necessary! Shooting in the Vancouver area.

キャスティングディレクターのコリーン・ボルトンおよびモーリーン・ウェッブは、**大手テレビシリーズに出演する日本語が話せる**
**日本人の方を募集しています。**演技経験は不要です！
撮影はバンクーバー近郊で行われます。

**Requirements:**
* Japanese-Canadians or Japanese born people 
* Must be a native and fluent Japanese speaker without an English accent 
* Open gender
* 18 – 70 years of age
* Paid opportunity (per UBCP)
* No acting experience required
* Must be based in Vancouver, BC (or the Lower Mainland)
* Must be a Canadian citizen, permanent resident, or have valid work permit

**応募条件：**
* 日系カナダ人、または日本生まれの方
* 英語訛りのない、ネイティブレベルで日本語が堪能な方
* 性別は問いません
* 18歳～70歳
* 報酬あり（UBCP規定に基づく）
* 演技経験は問いません（未経験OK）
* バンクーバーBC州（またはローワーメインランド）在住の方
* カナダ市民、永住権保持者、または有効なワーキングビザをお持ちの方

Performers with agents or performers who have auditioned for Colleen Bolton or Maureen Webb in the last 3 months NEED NOT APPLY. 
エージェントに所属している方、または過去3ヶ月以内にコリーン・ボルトンまたはモーリーン・ウェッブのオーディションを受けた方はご応募いただけません。

**If interested please submit your information to this Google Form:**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

**ご興味のある方は、以下のGoogleフォームよりご応募ください：**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

If you have any questions please email Casting Assistant, June Fukumura at [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com) 

ご質問がある場合は、キャスティングアシスタントの福村じゅんまでメールでお問い合わせください [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com)

items.text: ACTING CLASSES FOR STUDENTS ACROSS THE UK, AFFORDABLE, please share

sharedPost.text:
🎬 UK SCREEN ACTING CLASSES - JOIN TODAY 🎬

⏳TIME IS TICKING TO JOIN THESE CLASSES! Our intake for our Cadence Realism Screen Acting classes CLOSES in APRIL. With us, you get:

✅ an ALTERNATIVE theory that makes you understand how to play CHARACTER TRUTH, rather than your own emotions
✅ REAL ON SCREEN EXPERIENCE alongside your acting training (IMDb Credits)
✅ WEEKLY ONLINE CLASSES where you can join from ANYWHERE, as long as you have a WiFi connection and camera so we can see you during exercises 
✅ An acting course you can complete within a YEAR and END in our PAID WORK ACTING POOL

🔥 KIMALY joined our community late 2025, attending our recent DYNAMIC ACTING MASTERCLASS, and he’s seen the merit in acting based on CHARACTER rather than yourself. It has unlocked a NEW PERSPECTIVE for him… what do you think it can do for you?

Apply to join for APRIL, have a consultation call and SECURE YOUR PLACE WITH A DEPOSIT via this link:

https://screenliftstudios.co.uk/pricing

media.ocrText: May be a graphic of one or more people and text that says 'SCREENLIFT STUDIOS ACTOR TESTIMONIAL "BEING A PART OF SCREENLIFT STUDIOS HAS CHANGED MY PERSPECTIVE ON ACTING AND EASILY BALANCES WITH EVERYDAY LIFE. CADENCE REALISM HELPED ME UNDERSTAND HOW EVEN SMALL ADJUSTMENTS MAKE A MASSIVE DIFFERENCE IN A PERFORMANCE. LEARNING to ACT BASED ON CHARACTER TRUTH HAS SHIFTED THE WAY SCREEN ACTING. HAS HELPED ME REALISE THAT AUTHENTICITY AND SUBTLETY CAN BE JUST AS POWERFUL AS MORE OBVIOUS EXPRESSIONS OF EMOTION." KIMALY ROSS APPLY HERE HTTPS:/CAENLFTSTUDIOS.CO.UKIPRICI TRAINING AGES1 16+'

May be an image of text that says 'SCREENLIFT STUDIOS ACTORS ENROL NOW All levels welcome. Commitment required. COMMUNITY: 70 Discount available for under 18s MONTH APRIL INTAKE 7 APRIL JUNE 2026 11-WEEK CYCLE Break: 22 22June 29 June (No classes No retakes) For aspiring actors ready to train seriously, gain consistency, and elevate their craft. Sign up: screenliftstudios.co.uk/pricing pricing'

items.text:
Cześć!
Do etiudy studentów Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi poszukujemy AKTORA DZIECIĘCEGO - CHŁOPCA (11-12 lat) do głównej roli o charakterystycznej urodzie. Rola nie ma dialogów.
📍 Łódź
🗓️ 27-29.04.2026 r

W związku z udziałem dziecka na planie, niezbędne będą: zgoda dyrektora szkoły, opinia lekarza rodzinnego oraz opinia z poradnii psychologiczno-pedagogicznej. Dodatkowo opiekun będzie musiał być obecny na planie. 
Zlecenie płatne. 

Zgłoszenia (imię i nazwisko, zdjęcie oraz telefon kontaktowy do rodzica lub opiekuna prawnego) proszę przesyłać na maila w.blawat@student.filmschool.lodz.pl 

W razie pytań proszę pisać priv, chętnie odpowiem

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'DO ETIUDY STUDENTÓW SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ W ŁODZI POSZUKUJEMY AKTORA DZIECIĘCEGO (11-12 LAT). DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI 0 CHARAKTERYSTYCZNEJ URODZIE. ŁÓDŹ 27-29.04 ZGŁOSZENIA PROSZĘ WYSYŁAĆ NA ADRES W.BLAWAT BLAWAT@STUDENT.FLMSCHOOLLODOZ.PL'

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

🎬 STATYŚCI POSZUKIWANI – ZDJĘCIA W HISZPANII 🇪🇸

Agencja Aktorska „Sceneria” poszukuje czarnoskórych statystów do nowego filmu fabularnego o charakterze komediowym, realizowanego dla platformy premium. Nie jest to paradokument.

❗️SZUKAMY TYLKO CZARNOSKÓRYCH OSÓB 

🎭 Do zagrania m.in.:
- goście hotelowi
- uczestnicy wesela
- przechodnie

✈️ Zapewniamy:
- przelot (Warszawa lub Kraków)
- nocleg All Inclusive
- wynagrodzenie 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy

👥 Kogo szukamy:
- Osób w wieku 18-80 lat, czarnoskóre 

📅 Terminy zdjęć:
- 20–26 kwietnia – Lanzarote
- 1–31 maja – Fuerteventura oraz północ Hiszpanii

Wybrane osoby będą brały udział w jednym lub kilku dniach zdjęciowych, dlatego prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby dyspozycyjne pod koniec kwietnia i w maju. O konkretnych terminach poinformujemy indywidualnie.

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

W treści prosimy podać:
- imię i nazwisko
- wiek
- numer telefonu
- wzrost
- wymiary: klatka / pas / biodra
- rozmiar buta

W tytule: STATYSTA CZARNOSKÓRY HISZPANIA

📸 Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki (kolorowe, bez nakrycia głowy i okularów przeciwsłonecznych, najlepiej na jednolitym tle).

⚠️ Prosimy o przemyślane zgłoszenia.

Dziękujemy!

@everyone Our location team are on the hunt, in the NORTH WEST UK, for our first block of filming for 'The Eight SAGA: N.E.S.T. Project'. 

We are looking for; 
- Gothic Tower. 
- A Derelict Farm, and Barn.
- Abandoned Street , or a private courtyard.
- A Shed that looks aged. 

If you happen to know anyone with these locations that wouldn't mind Minimal Cast and Crew to film on these locations to support our growing project. 

Please leave a message in the comments. Our Location Manager Johnny Wilson will be on it!

All the best to our supporters and fans on the project,
Big Loves,
The N.E.S.T. PRODUCTION TEAM 
Ember Production

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID NON-UNION
EDUCATIONAL - LOS ANGELES

SUBMIT - sumeet.dang@icloud.com

Please submit with fitness pictures

LOCATION - Los Angeles area 

SHOOT DATE: 1 day, either Friday, March 27 or Saturday March 28th, need both days available. 

RATE: $200 for 8-10 hour shoot

UNION STATUS - NON-UNION

CAST NEEDS:

1 athletic MALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. Open ethnicity, aged 25-40. 

1 athletic FEMALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. SOUTH ASIAN/EAST INDIAN, aged 25-40. 

MORE INFORMATION: 

This is for an education meditation and breath work series for an accredited Indian Knowledge System meditation practice with research backed meditation practices for improving mental health.

This will be a really fun and relaxing shoot. You will be guided through many relaxing energizing meditation practices that will leave you feeling vibrant. 

To submit, please email: 

- headshot

- Some fitness pictures

- Confirm you’re comfortable doing longer periods of breath-work exercises

SUBJECT LINE: ROLE - Actor Name

Example: Fitness Model - Jane Smith

items.text:
**Seeking Director of Photography for Low Budget Dramedy Feature Film - "Incautious" (Chicago, IL)**

**“Incautious” Plot Summary:**

A stay-at-home mother struggles to watch over her children as she finds herself addicted to alcohol and other drugs. A broken man takes out his anguish on his wife and children.

***Compensation:***

**Rate: **Paid (Send me your rates)
**Payment:** Up to 17 Shooting Days, all on weekends

**Tentative Shoot Days: (All on Weekends)**

Sunday, May 3, Saturday, May 9, Sunday, May 10, Saturday, May 16, Sunday, May 17, Saturday, May 23, Sunday, May 24, Saturday May 30, Sunday, June 7th, Saturday, June 13, Sunday, June 14, Sunday, June 21, Saturday, June 27, Sunday, June 28, Sunday, July 12, Saturday, July 18, Backup Day - Saturday, July 25

**Duties:**

1. Bring his/her own camera equipment to the film set
2. Execution of Cinematography plan
3. Setting up Camera equipment in a timely efficient manner

4. Determining elements such as filters, shutter angles, focus, depth, of field and camera distance

5. Answering any questions the Director may have regarding Cinematography

**Role Requirements:**

1. A Reel of Visual Work

2. Be an approachable team player
3. Must show up on time and have good time management skills

4. Good technical camera operating skills
5. Good organizational skills

6. A great eye for detail
7. The ability to plan ahead regarding camera setups

**Director's Bio:**

Harry is a passionate filmmaker who has been watching movies since as long as he can remember. Some of his favorite films include, "Memento", "The Dark Knight", "The Lord of the Rings" trilogy, "Alien", “The Shining” etc. He has seen over 11,000 films and is as crazy about movies as any individual you will ever meet. Harry has worked on a number of various films, and has written, produced, directed, and edited "515", "Enter the Room", “In the Backseat”, “Bay for Blood” and “The Corridor Crossing”.

**More Info, Contact Information:**
If you are interested in this project, please contact me at edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com.

Also, feel free to visit my website. The link is listed below.
http://www.edgewaterfilmproduction.com/

**Contact Name: **Harry Waldman
**Contact Email: **edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com
**Contact Address:** Chicago, Illinois, 60626, United States
**Organization:** Edgewater Film Productions
items.previewDescription: I LOVE MOVIES I LOVE MOVIES 400 Favorite Films: 1. Memento 2. LOTR: Return of the King 3. The Dark Knight 4. The Shining 5 Alien 6 The Wages of Fear 7 The Social Network 8 Toy Story 3 9 The Truman Show 10. Batman Begins 11. LOTR: The Fellowship of the […]

Hey guys,

I'm a Surrey/London based headshot & portrait photographer & I'm running a March promo for my new page, offering the chance to win a free headshot or portrait session.

Instructions below if anyone's interested 😘 3 days left to enter!

[www.facebook.com/surreyportraits](https://www.facebook.com/surreyportraits)

**✨✨✨Win a FREE HEADSHOT OR PORTRAIT session worth £250✨✨✨**

**HOW TO ENTER**

**1. Follow @surreyportraits on instagram - **[www.instagram.com/surreyportraits](https://www.instagram.com/surreyportraits)

**2. Go to the 'free headshot' competition post & tag someone you think would like to win**

**3. Share the post to your story with the hashtag #headshotgiveaway**

**The winner will be drawn on 20th March 2026.**

items.title: Hey guys,

items.text:
The Mn They Couldn't Put Down
My name is Arthur Ward, and I am a new screenwriter developing a feature film based on the true story of my uncle, Tommy Ward.

The project is a gritty British crime drama titled **Tommy Ward: The Man They Couldn’t Put Down **, following a young Manchester traveller who rises through the Moss Side criminal world of the 1980s and 90s before surviving multiple shootings and eventually leaving that life behind to protect his family.

The story combines elements of British crime films such as *Legend* and *Snatch* with the emotional family story of films like *The Fighter*.

I have completed a screenplay and a short pitch document and would be grateful for the opportunity to share the project

topComments.text: If you need a Manchester director, Chris Jackson is your man

items.previewDescription: Upload your self-tape, choose industry professionals to review it, and receive expert feedback that elevates your audition craft.

sharedPost.text:
Lights. Camera. RIGEL! 🎬🍺

Something's brewing... and it's not just the stout.

We're crafting a platform that gives actors what they've always needed — honest, professional feedback on their self-tapes from real industry reviewers.

No fluff. No guesswork. Just real notes that level up your craft. ⭐

The countdown is on. Are you ready?

#RigelVirtuosity #LightsCameraRigel #SomethingsBrewing #ComingSoon #ActorLife #SelfTape #AuditionPrep #FilmIndustry #BehindTheScenes #StayTuned

items.title: Actor, Writer, Producer, Director and Professor Gregory Cioffi.

items.text:
ACTORS!

I will review your self tape or showreel within 24 hours and come back to you with in depth notes and directions on how to improve it and make it stand out with casting directors.

ALL BOOKINGS ARE STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL AND ALL MEDIA WILL BE DELETED AFTER THE BOOKING IS OVER.

I have been acting for 31 years, since I was 5, and in that time I have performed in West End, fringe theatre, off west end, tours, cruise ships, blockbuster films, feature films, short films and everything in between.
I have also been a casting director for the last 10 years, and have owned my own theatre and film production company for the last 4 years, so I have been involved in auditions from both sides of the table. I am also a well established writer/director and producer of theatre and film.

Needless to say, I’ve learned a few things.

No one ever teaches you how to properly record/edit a self tape, or what the most effective order all your clips should go in for your showreel, so that’s what I’m doing.

Ive also taken into account that most of us actors can’t afford hundreds of pounds on this services, so my review with two free reviews are only £20.

That’s it.

Book your slot here - https://distortedrebels.com/actor-resources/ols/products/showreelself-tape-review

I look forward to helping you!

Phoenix 🫶🏻

items.text:
CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link [https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true)

items.text:
🎬✨ Calling All Movie Lovers & BiG Dreamers ✨🎬

If you love movies… this is for You.

Whether you're into Acting, Storytelling, Filmmaking, or you just LOVE sittin in the Cinema gettin lost in a great film (like The Shawshank Redemption)… you’re invited 🎥🍿

We’ve created DBA aka DREAM BiG ARTiSTs Social Club:
A Fun, Lighthearted Community where we:

🍿 Go to the movies together
🎬 Organize regular cinema nights (twice a month)
🥂 Hang out, relax & connect
🤝 Meet Creatives, Artists & Great People
🍓 Share smoothies, simple foods & good vibes
💡 Enjoy fun, casual talks & ideas (nothing heavy)

No pressure. No cost. No expectations. Come as you are, Being You♥️

Just a space for people who love movies, creativity, and great energy.

So if you’ve ever gone to the cinema alone… or wished you had people to share that experience with…

This is your sign 👇

Join the group & come watch with us 🎥✨

items.text:
🎬 Nabór do filmu krótkometrażowego „PRÓG” – projekt festiwalowy

Szukamy II reżysera / asystenta reżysera do klimatycznego, onirycznego filmu o czasie, decyzjach i momentach, które przychodzą za późno.

To historia oparta na napięciu, spojrzeniach i atmosferze — bardziej odczuwalna niż opowiadana.

🎥 II REŻYSER / ASYSTENT REŻYSERA
Osoba zorganizowana, uważna i komunikatywna.Głównym zadaniem będzie koordynacja statystów na planie — ustawianie, pilnowanie ciągłości, kontakt i sprawne prowadzenie scen zbiorowych.

Szukamy kogoś, kto ogarnia logistykę, potrafi działać pod presją czasu i dobrze czuje dynamikę planu filmowego.

📞 Zdjęcia: 29 marca, Warszawa💡 1 dzień zdjęciowy🕯️ Projekt non-profit

❗ Świetna okazja do pracy na zaangażowanym, profesjonalnie prowadzonym planie i zdobycia doświadczenia‼️ Kameralna ekipa, skupienie na atmosferze i pracy z aktorem

Jeśli czujesz ten klimat napisz na priv.

Hey all,
If anyone in West London needs headshots I'd love to help! I have a Canon 6d and spring is a great time to get some pictures outside. 

I have written and shot 3 feature films and am currently in production of a vertical series. So I know what casting directors look for when viewing headshots. 

If you'd like pictures drop me a DM.

I'm trying to raise funds for a Mac Mini for my editor.

items.title: Hey all,

items.text:
Hi lovely people in filmmaking🧡

I’m Lisa Riesner, an actress and filmmaker passionate about telling stories that center strong, complex female voices.

I’m currently looking to collaborate with other women in film and TV who feel the same drive to create meaningful, authentic storytelling. Our film Moder was selected for the first round of the Oscars,

https://www.ekkofilm.dk/shortlist/film/moder/

 and I’m excited to keep building on that momentum with new creative collaborations.

Like many of you, I believe representation matters deeply — and I want to be part of shaping narratives where women are seen in all their depth, power, and nuance.

Filmmaking is never a solo journey, and I’d love to connect with like-minded creatives who want to build something impactful together.

If this resonates with you, please reach out! ✨

Instagram: @lisariesner_official

Can’t wait to connect 🙌🏾🌸

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: Garnier Hair Campaign**  ✨

**Women with gorgeous hair needed!**

We’re looking to connect with **UK based millenial women (aged 30–45) **who are** loyal Garnier Olia users (10+ years).**

For this project, we’re specifically looking for someone with **long, glossy hair** (ideally dark/brunette) and a natural confidence on camera.

This shoot will take place in **Prague (mid-April, dates TBC)**, with an **£8000 buyout (plus standard shoot fees and expenses)**

If this sounds like you — or you know someone who fits the bill — **tag your friend with the beautiful hair below**

** To apply, please send: **

– Your name, age and location

– A recent photo

– A short note on your experience using Garnier Olia 

📩 Email: casting@casperblackcasting.com

items.text:
Für eine Film-/Videoproduktion suchen wir eine ältere Schauspielerin mit folgendem Profil:
 • Weiblich, ca. 65–80 Jahre
 • Natürliches, authentisches Erscheinungsbild
 • Graue oder weiße Haare
 • Ausdrucksstarkes Gesicht, das Emotionen gut transportieren kann
 • Keine Model-Erfahrung notwendig – wichtig ist Glaubwürdigkeit

Rolle:
Eine ältere Frau in einer intensiven, emotionalen Situation (Schmerz/Unwohlsein wird dargestellt). Schauspielerische Ausdrucksstärke und Authentizität sind hier besonders wichtig.

Drehort: Kreis Recklinghausen
Drehzeit: April für einen Drehtag
Gage: kann gerne Privat besprochen werden

Bei Interesse bitte mit aktuellen Fotos und ggf. Referenzen melden 🙌

items.text:
Für eine Film-/Videoproduktion suchen wir einen Schauspieler mit folgendem Profil:
• Männlich, ca. 45–60 Jahre

 • Markantes Gesicht, gerne mit leichten Altersmerkmalen (z. B. Geheimratsecken, Bartansatz)

 • Eher ernster, durchsetzungsstarker Ausdruck

 • Gepflegtes, seriöses Auftreten (z. B. Arzt-/Autoritätstyp)

 • Authentische Ausstrahlung, starke Präsenz

Rolle:

Ein strenger, fokussierter Charakter (z. B. Arzt oder Autoritätsperson), der ruhig, aber intensiv spielt – wenig Worte, viel Ausdruck.

Drehort: Kreis Recklinghausen

Drehzeit: April für einen Drehtag

Gage: kann gerne Privat besprochen werden

Cześć!

🎬Zapraszamy na CASTING REKLAMOWY!🎬

📍RÓŻNE ROLE - 💸 BARDZO WYSOKIE STAWKI! 💸 Warszawa

Poszukujemy:

* 👨mężczyzn w wieku 45 - 55 lat

Mężczyźni, różnej budowy ciała. Cechy charakterystyczne np. odstające uszy, brzuszek - mile widziane. Różne typy urody.

recall: 10.04.2026 - w studio

przymiarki: 17.04.2026

zdjęcia: 22.04.2026

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres mailowy:

📧casting@unagimedia.pl

w tytule wpisując: 007

🎥 Zgłoszenie musi zawierać:

* imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost

* zdjęcie portretowe oraz zdjęcie sylwetki

* wizytówkę - przedstawienie się, podanie wieku oraz wzrostu, opowiedzenie o swoich pasjach i zainteresowaniach, o tym co sprawia Ci w życiu radość.

Na koniec należy pokazać dłonie z obu stron oraz oba profile.

Nagranie załącz w formie linku do platformy YouTube.

items.title: WARSZAWA!

items.text:
Casting call-student short film
We are the filmmaking second year student from University of Huddersfield, The film is a psychological thriller, £15 one days, totally will be £45, including travel fees and catering 

logline:

After fleeing a police raid and vanishing into a forest, a fugitive's night of survival becomes a quiet unravelling of reality, as hunger, fear and fractured memory begin to surface.

It follows Tom Calder, a man in his mid to late 20s, over one night as he is being chased and hiding in woods.

Tom is quiet and keeps to himself. He doesn’t speak much and tries to stay in control, but as the night goes on, he becomes more unstable and unpredictable.

For casting, we need someone who can show emotion through body language and facial expressions, as there is very little to no dialogue.

If you have any concerns feel free to chat with me

It follows Tom Calder, a man in his mid to late 20s, over one night as he is being chased and hiding in woods.

Tom is quiet and keeps to himself. He doesn’t speak much and tries to stay in control, but as the night goes on, he becomes more unstable and unpredictable.

For casting, we need someone who can show emotion through body language and facial expressions, as there is very little to no dialogue.

If you have any concerns feel free to chat with me

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

items.text:
Hi everyone!
I’m looking for some career guidance regarding management.

1. Is it better to have one manager who handles both modeling and acting, or is it more effective to have specialized managers for each?

2. Does it make sense to have separate managers for different regions (LA, NY, Atlanta), or should one manager oversee everything?

topComments.text: If you want more help at understanding the best ways to get represented contact Zariah Cameron-Lovell She has a lot of knowledge to help you!

If you want work in a market, you need an agent in that market. Most people living in Colorado, if they want consistent acting work, are seeking agents and agencies in other markets (Utah, NM, Atlanta, LA, NY).  If you have a CO agent, even if you’re booking work, there is rarely enough work to make a living. Seeking agents in other markets can help you find work more consistently and allows you to be sent out or audition for more projects.

items.text:
**SUSZEC woj. śląskie**

**11 kwietnia, sobota**

**film fabularny**

Do filmu fabularnego, lata 70te, szukam Statystów - **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-40 lat w charakterze PILOTÓW.**

**Stawka: 140 zł /dzień zdjęciowy lub 280 zł **dla panów, którzy zostaną wybrani do epizodu niemego. Płatne gotówką po planie.

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **SUSZEC **

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: **tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text: Has your child appeared in a TV show? If yes then your voice matters more than ever. The TV Industry Human Rights Forum needs you and your perspectives for an important project on children's rights. Behind every young performer is a parent navigating unique opportunities, challenges, and decisions—and your experience can help shape a better future for families just like yours. Please complete this confidential survey and share it with others in your networks. You’ll be contributing valuable insights that can improve support systems, working conditions, and overall wellbeing for children on TV productions. Follow the survey link for more information about the project.

items.text:
Casting for voiceover actors for PODCAST in Los Angeles for mid-April. 

🎭 **CASTING CALL: SINGLE & READY TO MINGLE**

We’re looking for talented actors to bring our faith-filled dramedy ***Single & Ready to Mingle: A Faith-Filled Experience*** to life.

Set at a Christian singles retreat, this story follows three women navigating love, faith, temptation, and second chances during one unforgettable weekend.

Think **sisterhood, secrets, laughter, and spiritual growth** — with a little romance and chaos along the way.

✨ Multiple roles available
✨ Faith-based dramedy series
✨ Strong, dynamic characters

**Ready to mingle?**

🎬 **Apply for casting —copy and paste link. **https://form.jotform.com/250552717627157

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'READYTOMINGLE TO READY MINGLE MATTHEW MATTHEH 1:7 CUPID RUTH SHAUNA THREI WOME N ONE RE RETREAT. THATWOMNUONERETRTATINL TREAT.ENDI NDL ENDLESSREVELATION SSREVELAT ION'

message.text: Raj Kumar remains one of the most iconic figures in Indian cinema. Known for his deep voice, powerful dialogue delivery, and unmatched screen presence, he brought a rare intensity to every role. His unique style and fearless personality made him stand out in every film he appeared in. He wasn’t just acting—he was creating moments that audiences would remember forever.”###Rose’s##Teapot🎥🎥🎥🎥🎥📽️📽️📽️📽️📽️👌👌👌👌

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING 🚨

Surrealist drama, expected dates: 25th & 26th April 

WE HAVE CAST ARIA & OWEN, NOW ONLY LOOKING FOR ARIA'S MUM - preferably black but open to other ethnicities. 

PLEASE SHARE!!!!!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SHORT FILM HALF 00 oar COAT WHAT BEGINS AS A 4 NORMAL CONVERSATION ON AN ORDINARY DAY TAKES AN UNEXPECTED TURN, LEAVING ARIA LOST IN WORLD OF HER OWN AND FORCED TO CONFRONT THE REALITY SHE HAS BEEN AVOIDING SINCE A RECENT TRAGEDY.'
May be a graphic of text

May be a graphic of tree and text that says 'MORE INFO SURREALIST DRAMA, 15-20 MINUTES LOCATION: LONDON (EXACT LOCATIONS TBC) F APRIL 24-26 (TBC) 3DAYS 3 DAYS DAYSOFSHOOTING OF SHOOTING UNPAID, FOOD & TRAVEL COVERED @HALFCOATPRODUCTIONS ON INSTAGRAM & YOUTUBE GET IN CONTACT IF INTERESTED IN BEING PART OF THE CREW! AUDITIONS Send headshots/showreels to halfcoatproductions@gmail.com For the roles of Aria & Aria's Mum, if we are interested we will send a small excerpt to beperformed & sent back to us by early-mid march.'

film fabularny 

Szukam dublera:

- Mężczyzna ok. 25-35 lat, średniego wzrostu (ok. 1,7m) z wysportowaną sylwetką. Ponadto brunet, lekko wpadający w rudy. Mile widziane wąsy 🙂

STAWKA 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: DUBLER 

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called "Just Go - -The Day I left
Kevin Costner "

I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 

I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.

You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.

Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 

Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 

I'm excited to hear from you. 

Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :

A project: 
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40706407/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_1_tt_8_nm_0_in_0_q_just%20go%20the%20day

Hello everyone, we are currently casting for a short comedy film which will be filming in Flint, North Wales on the 31st of March and 2nd of April.

Travel expenses will be reimbursed.

If interested, please contact ewan.llay@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Urgent Casting Call 'Birthday Boy'- Short Film A man struggling through a mid-life crisis discovers that 11 order to mature, he has to act little immature Tony 35 - 50 years old) Tony is hesitant to turn 40 as he feels his youthful prime slipping away from him Pete (35- 50 years old) Pete is already in his 40's and cant understand why Tony is so hesitant to join him Volunteer Only Filming 3r*t of March and 2nd April in Flint, North Wales If interested please contact ewan.llay@gmail.com'

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL FOR TOMORROW
Hi! We are a film group at the University of Salford who are desperately looking for someone to play the character of ANNIE in our short film No Ladies, Please. 

The film follows a group of women in the 70’s, who rebel against the pub that they are refused service in. 

The shoot days are the 23rd-25th of March at the Weaste Social Club in Salford, unpaid but travel and food are covered. 

If this is something you would be interested in, please email calladcox@outlook.com

We really want to hear from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of flower and text that says 'Urgent Casting Call No Ladies Please Short Film Annie playing age 20-26 The Follower Filming will take place in Salford from fromthe23rd-25thofMarch the 23rd 25th of March Travel and Food expenses covered Dmusformoreinformation us for more information Dm'

Actors - 70 to 80 years old to portray a married couple for a PSA.

Open to all Ethnicities.

Films in the Boston area.

One day of Filming.

items.text: Hello I live in Hampton Virginia and I’m looking for casting call for baby modeling .please help me go in the right direction already signed him up for gerber baby contest still waiting on that but my grandson is just to handsome not to share with the world ❤️ his birthday is 1/30/2026 is name is Ali Nathaniel ❤️

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of baby and smiling

topComments.text: Gerber baby contests is just that — a contest. It doesn’t get them signed to anything, tho. Unfortunately, there’s nothing in the DMV so you’d have to go near by states like NY, SC/NC etc. What’s your distance to those states?

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: “MY AIM IS TRUE”**
**(Vancouver, BC | NON-UNION)**

Indie film (10–15 minutes) seeking strong actors for two roles. Dramatic, literary, and dialogue-driven (inspired by a classic play).

**ROLES:**

**STEVE MATTICE (Male, 55–70) — LEAD**
A confident, gregarious, and happily married politician, who aspires to be party leader. He receives unsettling news that may damage his reputation.** Substantial role across full shoot.**

**SORAYA BAHAR (Female, 55–70) --SUPPORTING**

A veteran CBC journalist and Abigail Mattice’s (Steve’s wife’s) best friend and confidante. Her life is turned upside down by a revelation from her distant past.
**Smaller, dialogue-heavy role (approx. one scene / shorter shoot time).**

**SHOOT DETAILS:**
📍 East Vancouver, BC
🗓 1–2 shoot days (week of April 20) + 1 rehearsal

**PAY:**
💰 Steve Mattice: $200 stipend + meals
💰 Soraya Bahar: $100 stipend + meals

**PERKS:**
🎥 Festival submissions
🎬 Professional-quality reel footage
🤝 Focused, collaborative set

**TO APPLY:**
Please send by April 3rd:
• Headshot
• Short bio or résumé
• Reel/clips (if available, not required)

To  Kegan Doyle: [Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca](mailto:Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca)

Contact me if you have questions.

**This is a great opportunity for experienced actors who enjoy doing character-driven work.**

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

Who applied for other characters can submit their audition by 25th March. 

**Casting:**

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
Hi, wir suchen als kleine No Budget Produktion 8 Komparsen die Lust haben uns bei einem Teaserdreh nächste Woche am 28.03 in Berlin von 8:30 bis ca. 17:00 zu unterstützen.

Der Teaser wird gedreht, um damit Finanzierungen für die spätere Spielfilmproduktion zu akquirieren.

Es wird ein Rom Com Drama & geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. 

Schreibt mir gerne eine DM bei Interesse mit Foto.

Wir würden uns sehr freuen, wenn wir 8 Menschen zusammenkriegen. Gerne so divers wie möglich.

attachments.ocrText: May be a doodle of text that says 'HELP Wir drehen einen Film! Und suchen 8-10 Menschen, die Lust haben, im Hintergrund dabei zu sein und uns damit bei unserem Teaserdreh zu unterstützen. Der Teaser hilft uns dabei, die Finanzierung zu sichern und einen ersten Eindruck vom Look & Feel des Films zu zeigen. Es geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. Wenn alles gut läuft, würden wir euch super gerne a auch später im bezahlten Projekt berücksichtigen Berlin (Gerdan's Café) 28.03. ab 8：30 ROSUGATN Essen, gute Stimmung & tolle Leute inklusive Schreib mir, wenn du Zeit & Lust hast und zu unterstützen'

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.

items.summary:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.
items.title: Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show

items.text:
Stimme • Herz • Show – Pur und Authentisch! 🎤✨

Wer mich kennt, weiß: Bei mir gibt es keine Maskerade und keine Drag-Show.

Ich stehe für 100% echtes Entertainment.

Das Besondere? Eine feminine Performance trifft auf meine natürliche, sonore Männerstimme. Ein Kontrast, der unter die Haut geht und bekannten Klassikern eine ganz neue Seele verleiht. 🎶

Egal ob:

✅ Kult & Legenden (Tribute Shows)
✅ Party & Energie (Schlager-Remixe & Pop)
✅ Gefühl & Tiefgang (Chansons & Liedermacher)

Ich bin weltweit für euch unterwegs – zu Lande, zu Wasser und überall dort, wo gute Musik und echte Emotionen gebraucht werden. 🌍🚢

Lust auf ein maßgeschneidertes Live-Erlebnis?

Schaut euch die Details im Flyer an oder schreibt mir direkt eine DM! 📩

#MathiasMarieKaiser #LiveGesang #eventhighlight #KreuzfahrtShow #transartist

items.text:
Casting - rolki
Do krótkich obyczajowych, pozytywnych scen mówionych na media społecznościowe. 29.03, Piaseczno. #płatne 

Poszukujemy ładne i zadbane osoby (wiek grający):

– dziewczyna 18–22 lat

– kobieta 30–45 lat

– kobieta 25–35 lat

– kobieta 55–70 lat

Zgłoszenia: imię, wiek, 2–3 zdjęcia + krótka wizytówka video + telefon w wiadomości prywatnej.

Bez tekstu mówionego (statyści):

– chłopak 18–25 lat

– mężczyzna 30–45 lat

– mężczyzna 30–40 lat

– mężczyzna 55–70 lat

#płatne

message.text:
🎬🚑 Zabezpieczenie medyczne i wodne planu filmowego 🚤

Kolejny intensywny i pełen wyzwań projekt za nami! Mieliśmy przyjemność zapewnić kompleksowe zabezpieczenie medyczne, wodne oraz ewakuacyjne na planie filmowym, gdzie liczyła się każda sekunda i pełna gotowość do działania.

Nasze zespół czuwał nad bezpieczeństwem zarówno na lądzie, jak i na wodzie – od zabezpieczenia scen wymagających obecności ratowników, po gotowość do natychmiastowej ewakuacji w sytuacjach nagłych. Profesjonalizm, doświadczenie i świetna współpraca całej ekipy pozwoliły stworzyć bezpieczne warunki do realizacji nawet najbardziej wymagających ujęć 🎥

Dziękujemy za zaufanie i owocną współpracę – to dla nas ogromna motywacja do dalszego działania i podnoszenia standardów bezpieczeństwa 💪

Do zobaczenia przy kolejnych produkcjach!

#robrescue #zabezpieczeniemedyczne #planfilmowy #ratownictwo #bezpieczeństwo #współpraca

items.text: Hello everyone! We’re looking for a German speaking livestream host for our business client, which is a global consumer electronics brand. This is professionally produced from our Hollywood studio. Part time paid gig starting in early May for a few weeks and may extend. Please share and message me. Thank you!🙏🏻

items.text: Et lille fiskeformet symbol ses ofte på bagsiden af ​​nogle biler, men dets sande betydning er ukendt for de fleste. Det er hverken et simpelt dekorativt klistermærke eller et tilfældigt æstetisk valg. Dette symbol har faktisk et meget specifikt formål, og de, der bruger det, ønsker at formidle et bestemt budskab til andre trafikanter. Find ud af præcis, hvad det repræsenterer, og hvem der typisk bruger det, i artiklen nedenfor.

items.text: En blikkenslager kom forbi i morges og reparerede alt. Da han var på vej ud, vendte han sig om og sagde: "Dæk altid vaskens afløb til, når du forlader huset." Ingen forklaring. Meget alvorligt. Nu er jeg nysgerrig ... er der nogen, der ved hvorfor?

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

topComments.text: Wir haben es über WhatsApp gemacht. Jeder hat es und funktioniert am besten. Erstell einfach ne Gruppe.
Ja, eine WhatsApp-Gruppe hat sich gut bewährt.
